MaltegoTransform.name: misp_event_pivot
MaltegoTransform.description: Find MISP events whose attributes contain the input value.
MaltegoTransform.author: Solomon Neas <srneas@gmail.com>

Property.name: transform.local.command
Property.description: The command to execute for this transform

Property.name: transform.local.parameters
Property.description: The parameters to pass to the transform command

Property.name: transform.local.working-directory
Property.description: The working directory used when invoking the executable

Property.name: transform.local.debug
Property.description: When this is set, the transform's text output will be printed to the output window
